title: Find the Quiet Students in All Exams
description: Find students who never scored the highest or lowest in any exam they took.
constraints: student_id is the primary key of Student
(exam_id, student_id) is the primary key of Exam
A student must have taken at least one exam to be eligible
If an exam has only one student, that student is both highest and lowest — exclude them
key_concept: Exclude students who ever appear as max or min scorer in any exam they attended.

hints.L1: Find students who ever scored the max or min in any exam. Exclude them from all students who took exams.
hints.L2: Get max/min per exam. Find student_ids matching those scores in their respective exams. Negate.
hints.L3: WITH exam_stats AS (SELECT exam_id, MAX(score) max_s, MIN(score) min_s FROM Exam GROUP BY exam_id) SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.student_name FROM Student s JOIN Exam e ON s.student_id=e.student_id WHERE s.student_id NOT IN (SELECT e2.student_id FROM Exam e2 JOIN exam_stats es ON e2.exam_id=es.exam_id WHERE e2.score=es.max_s OR e2.score=es.min_s) ORDER BY s.student_id
